heading: Reallocation of base resources
label: 1680g Reallocation of base resources
notes: Amendments1992—Subsec. (a). , substituted “Secretary has submitted to the President, for inclusion in the report required to be transmitted to the Congress under ,” for “Secretary has submitted to the Congress”.Pub. L. 102–573, § 805section 1671 of this title
amendments: Amendments1992—Subsec. (a). , substituted “Secretary has submitted to the President, for inclusion in the report required to be transmitted to the Congress under ,” for “Secretary has submitted to the Congress”.Pub. L. 102–573, § 805section 1671 of this title

children.heading: Report to Congress
children.label: a Report to Congress
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, any allocation of Service funds for a fiscal year that reduces by 5 percent or more from the previous fiscal year the funding for any recurring program, project, or activity of a service unit may be implemented only after the Secretary has submitted to the President, for inclusion in the report required to be transmitted to the Congress under , a report on the proposed change in allocation of funding, including the reasons for the change and its likely effects.section 1671 of this title

children.heading: Appropriated amounts
children.label: b Appropriated amounts
children.text: Subsection (a) shall not apply if the total amount appropriated to the Service for a fiscal year is less than the amount appropriated to the Service for previous fiscal year.
